notes: Swin-T DINO: 50 epochs, 50-image synthetic dev subset, 256x256px, CPU.
YOLO11n-OBB: 50 epochs, same dataset, CPU (MPS crashes on 0-instance batches).
Eval uses axis-aligned bbox IoU (DINO outputs bboxes; Radon OBB refinement skipped in fast mode).
YOLO angle error (0.66 deg) is meaningful — YOLO outputs true OBBs with corner-point labels.
DINO angle error (29.6 deg) reflects fast-mode bbox aspect-ratio estimation only, not Radon-refined angles.
Per-band thresholds (150/400px) not meaningful for 256x256 training images (max streak ~140px diagonal).
Phase 8 targets (precision>=0.94, recall>=0.97) require cloud Swin-L training on full-resolution real data.
device: cpu (MPS unsupported for DINO multi-scale deformable attention)

per_band.note: Thresholds 150/400px not meaningful for 256x256 training images (max ~140px streak length)
